mapper.select:
SELECT M.MENU_ID AS menuId, M.MENU_NAME AS menuName, M.PRICE AS price, MF.FILE_ID AS fileId, MF.ORIGINAL_NAME AS originalFileName FROM MENU M LEFT JOIN MENU_FILE MF ON M.MENU_ID = MF.MENU_ID
WHERE M.MENU_NAME LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%'
ORDER BY M.MENU_ID OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{pageSize} ROWS ONLY

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MENU
WHERE MENU_NAME LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%'
mapper.insert:
SELECT MENU_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO MENU (MENU_ID, MENU_NAME, PRICE) VALUES (#{menuId}, #{menuName}, #{price})
